channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The AI risk that few organizations are governing
item.description: You know how many human users have access to your financial systems. Do you know how many AI agents do?

item.title: New Interactive Sky Formula 1 Features Let Viewers Take The Wheel
item.description: New side-bar interface lets you access race replays, driver cams, background details, live in-race standings and more on your terms.

item.title: Is Europe Poised To Lead the Quantum Computing Race?
item.description: Europe's strengths across multiple dimensions have resulted in creating successful initiatives in quantum technologies. Will this translate into comme...

item.title: Steam Frame VR Confirmed For 2026 Release Alongside Steam Machine
item.description: Despite skyrocketing RAM and storage prices, Steam has confirmed its plans to release the Steam Frame and Steam machine in 2026, although the pricing ...

item.title: AI isn’t killing jobs yet—CEOs are using layoffs to fund a $2.5 trillion arms race
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Anthropic’s Department of War lawsuit is even higher-stakes amid the AI boom
item.description: Anthropic suing the U.S. Department of War perhaps wasn’t a surprise, but it was nevertheless a shock.

item.title: AI can double output. Human biology can’t
item.description: There's an AI burnout trap, and your productivity gains are fragile.

item.title: Whoop Has A New Service For Women’s Health And Cycle Tracking
item.description: A new blood panel offered by Whoop analyzes 11 body stats to add insight on cycle regulation and a person's hormone levels. It's coming to U.S. Whoop ...

item.title: Trump says Iran war is ‘very complete, pretty much’ sparking global stock rally
item.description: But also, "we’re going to go further."

item.title: Air Force Acquires Mobile Units Making Fuel From Air And Electricity
item.description: The U.S. Air Force is acquiring AIRCO's containerized system which can produce aviation fuel anywhere int he world, with the first unit to be delivere...

item.title: An already chaotic spring travel season is colliding with effects of Iran war
Existing-home sales on economic calendar after small-business-optimism retreat
Futures point to extension of stock-market gains as oil slide continues
Fed officials closely monitor Iran conflict for potential inflation impact
item.description: Hostilities with Iran pose a potential risk for higher inflation as Federal Reserve policymakers monitor the energy price impact ahead of their next m...

item.title: Oracle expected to slash thousands of jobs as massive AI spending creates financial cash crisis
item.description: Oracle reportedly planning massive layoffs involving thousands of employees as AI spending creates cash crunch. Job cuts could reportedly affect 18% o...

item.title: US economic freedom surges in biggest annual increase in over two decades
item.description: U.S. economic freedom score jumps 2.6 points in Heritage Foundation index, ending a five-year decline. America ranks 22nd globally in the annual repor...

item.title: Will tapping oil reserves curb soaring gas prices?
item.description: G7 finance ministers weigh emergency oil reserve release as Middle East tensions send crude soaring above $115, threatening global economic stability.

item.title: IRS unveils proposed regulations for new Trump Accounts savings program
item.description: The IRS and Treasury proposed new rules for Trump Accounts, including details for opening an account and taking the federal seed money if eligible to ...

item.title: Big Tech stocks quietly gaining momentum — but don’t expect the bounce to last
Trump announces sanctions relief to ease oil prices, says Iran war to end soon
What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
